rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation supporting a broad background claim that mental simulation can improve brand-related outcomes. The citing paper does not assign Zhao et al. (2011) a distinct role in hypothesis development, variable operationalization, or empirical design; its core experimental setup is tied more directly to other sources (especially Elder and Krishna). Because the citation functions as general literature support rather than a specific building block, this is best classified as a passing mention.
